message:
Extract shared PATH setup and add bash configuration

Move PATH logic to sh/path for reuse across bash and zsh. Both shells
now source this shared file, avoiding duplication. Zsh retains
typeset -U for deduplication; bash uses standard PATH appending.
Simplify zsh/zshenv to 7 lines, bash/bashrc to 9 lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# shellcheck shell=bash disable=SC1090
+
+# Source bashrc for login shells
+[[ -f ~/.bashrc ]] && source ~/.bashrc

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# shellcheck shell=bash disable=SC1090
+
+# Source shared PATH setup
+[ -f ~/.path ] && . ~/.path
+
+# Starship prompt
+if command -v starship &> /dev/null; then
+  eval "$(starship init bash)"
+fi

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+# shellcheck shell=sh
+
+# Shared PATH setup (sourced by bash and zsh)
+
+# Locale
+export LANG=en_US.UTF-8
+export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8
+
+# User paths
+PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"       # Home-dir installers (Claude Code)
+PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH"       # Rust
+PATH="$HOME/.go/bin:$PATH"          # Go (GOPATH)
+PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH"         # Bun
+PATH="$HOME/.lmstudio/bin:$PATH"    # LM Studio
+
+# macOS-specific paths
+if [ "$(uname)" = Darwin ]; then
+  PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/opt/homebrew/sbin:$PATH"
+  PATH="/usr/X11R6/bin:$PATH"
+  PATH="/Library/TeX/texbin:$PATH"
+fi
+
+export PATH

@@ -1,28 +1,7 @@
-# shellcheck shell=bash disable=SC2206,SC2128
+# shellcheck shell=bash disable=SC1090,SC2034
 
-# Locale
-export LANG=en_US.UTF-8
-export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8
+# Ensure unique PATH entries
+typeset -U path
 
-# PATH setup (mirrors Fish config)
-typeset -U path  # Ensure unique entries
-
-path=(
-  ~/.local/bin           # Home-dir installers (Claude Code)
-  ~/.cargo/bin           # Rust
-  ~/.go/bin              # Go (GOPATH)
-  ~/.bun/bin             # Bun
-  ~/.lmstudio/bin        # LM Studio
-  $path
-)
-
-# macOS-specific paths
-if [[ $(uname) == Darwin ]]; then
-  path=(
-    /opt/homebrew/bin
-    /opt/homebrew/sbin
-    /usr/X11R6/bin
-    /Library/TeX/texbin
-    $path
-  )
-fi
+# Source shared PATH setup
+[ -f ~/.path ] && . ~/.path
